param_source_note: HF card states 25% of weights active per token (2 of 8 experts); active_params = 314B * 0.25. GitHub README supports expert config (8 experts / top-2) and context=8192.

Fine-grained MoE: 16 experts with top-4 routing. License: Databricks Open Model License (not Apache). context_window=32768 from HF model card config (max_position_embeddings); the Databricks blog rounds this to '32,000 tokens' in prose — added HF supporting_url to nail the exact figure.
Dense-MoE Hybrid: 10B dense transformer + 128x3.66B MoE MLP, top-2 gating. HF card supports architecture decomposition.
